creator: gerrit.beine@gmx.de
text:
Am Dienstag, 19. Dezember 2006 23:14 schrieb Edwin Groothuis:
> Maintainer of net-mgmt/p5-Nagios-Plugin,
>
> Please note that PR ports/106941 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/106941
This patch seems to be ok :-)
Please commit it.

So long...

Gerrit
